expectations.text: Entity class file exists at src/Entity/KnowledgeResource.php
Entity class has either #[ContentEntityType] attribute (D11) or @ContentEntityType annotation (D10)
expectations.evidence: Line 13: @ContentEntityType annotation with id = "knowledge_resource", label = @Translation("Knowledge Resource")

expectations.text: resource_type field defines allowed_values with article, research_paper, tool, documentation
Entity handlers include form, list_builder, access handler, and route_provider declarations
expectations.evidence: Annotation handlers: list_builder = KnowledgeResourceListBuilder, access = KnowledgeResourceAccessControlHandler, form = {default, add, edit, delete}, route_provider = {html = AdminHtmlRouteProvider}

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en knowledge_resource returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Transcript: ddev drush en knowledge_resource -y -> [success] Module knowledge_resource has been installed. (Permissions)

expectations.text: Entity type is installed: running ddev drush php-eval hasDefinition check outputs 'installed'
An entity can be created: running ddev drush php-eval create + save outputs an id without error
